name: Big Springs Park
description: Big Springs Park is a place to play pickleball in Springville, AL. There are 2 outdoor hard and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Cropwell Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Cropwell Baptist Church in Pell City, AL! There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Eden West Side Baptist Church
description: Eden West Side Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pell City, AL. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Pell City Outdoor Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Pell City Outdoor Courts in Pell City, AL! There are 9 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights and restrooms. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: St. Clair County Event Center
description: St. Clair County Event Center is a place to play pickleball in Odenville, AL. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons.
open_play_schedule: Check our facebook for open play schedule facebook.com/stclaircoarena
fees: Members only — $100 for St. Clair County Residents per year, $10 day pass. Register online
